# libwebp Test Data

This directory mirrors the upstream libwebp test-data corpus for parser and
codec conformance tests.

Upstream: https://chromium.googlesource.com/webm/libwebp-test-data

Vendored commit: `06ddd96 update pgm files`

The corpus is distributed under libwebp's BSD-style license. See `COPYING` in
this directory for the license text.
